summary: Tested Member Pages Extended Features - Inventory Management, Barcode Scanning, POS System with Stripe, and Analytics Dashboard. All 14 backend tests passed, all 4 main tabs (POS, Inventory, Scanner, Overview) verified in UI.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ GET /api/page-inventory/{page_id} - Returns inventory with 1 item tracked (quantity 98)
✓ POST /api/barcode/search - Found test product with barcode 1234567890123
✓ GET /api/pos/{page_id}/settings - Returns POS settings with tax_rate: 0%
✓ POST /api/pos/transaction - Cash transaction creates order (order_id: pos_9642c82dab50)
✓ POST /api/pos/checkout/create - Stripe checkout returns valid checkout_url (https://checkout.stripe.com/...)
✓ GET /api/page-analytics/{page_id} - Analytics dashboard with 4 orders, $124.97 revenue
✓ Frontend POS tab shows 1 product available ($29.99 Test Product)
✓ Frontend Inventory tab shows stock management with quantity tracking
✓ Frontend Scanner tab has both Barcode Scan and AI Scan sub-tabs
✓ Frontend Overview/Analytics dashboard shows revenue metrics and top performing items
seed_data_creation: POS transactions created during testing - order_id: pos_9642c82dab50, pos_d44f8a051568
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Member Pages Extended Features are fully functional: 1) POS Terminal loads products from API, supports cash/card payments, Stripe checkout returns valid URLs 2) Inventory shows stock levels (98 units for test product) with edit capability 3) Scanner has both barcode search (finds items) and AI Scan (camera/upload) 4) Analytics dashboard shows $124.97 revenue from 4 orders. No issues found.

features_verified.inventory_api: VERIFIED - GET returns inventory items, PUT updates quantity
features_verified.barcode_search: VERIFIED - POST /api/barcode/search finds products by barcode
features_verified.pos_cash_transaction: VERIFIED - POST /api/pos/transaction creates order with receipt
features_verified.pos_stripe_checkout: VERIFIED - POST /api/pos/checkout/create returns valid Stripe checkout URL
features_verified.pos_transactions_list: VERIFIED - GET /api/pos/{page_id}/transactions returns history with summary
features_verified.frontend_pos_tab: VERIFIED - Shows products, cart, payment options (Cash/Card)
features_verified.frontend_inventory_tab: VERIFIED - Shows stock levels, edit buttons, low stock filter
features_verified.frontend_scanner_tab: VERIFIED - Barcode Scan and AI Scan sub-tabs visible
features_verified.frontend_analytics: VERIFIED - Dashboard shows revenue ($124.97), orders (4), top items

stripe_integration.note: Stripe checkout URLs are valid and redirect to Stripe payment page
